steps: Go to https://app.hubspot.com and log in (you must be a Super Admin)
Click the settings gear icon in the top navigation bar
In the left sidebar, navigate to Integrations → Private Apps
Enter a name and description for your app (e.g., 'Marketing API Integration')
Under the 'Scopes' tab, select the Marketing scopes you need (e.g., marketing-email, forms, marketing-events)
Click 'Create app' and then confirm in the dialog
Copy the access token shown — this is your API key

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: Private App Access Token
credential_fields.description: The access token generated by your HubSpot private app, used as a Bearer token for Marketing API calls

notes: HubSpot Marketing API uses the same Private App token mechanism as the CRM API
Legacy API Keys (hapikey) were deprecated in November 2022 — use Private App access tokens instead
You must be a Super Admin to create private apps
Select marketing-specific scopes: marketing-email for transactional emails, forms for form management, marketing-events for event tracking
Transactional email (single send API) requires the 'Transactional Email' add-on in your HubSpot plan
Access tokens do not expire but can be rotated from the private app settings page

test_endpoint.description: List all forms in the HubSpot account to verify the access token and marketing scopes
